moments.author: Elon Musk
moments.quote: AI‑generated cover of “God Bless USA” – Damn it’s good huh
moments.why: A widely viewed patriotic video post on Independence Day that spurred viral engagement.
moments.url: Link to coverage of Musk posting patriotic song with millions of views

moments.author: Michael Saylor
moments.quote: We can still make something Ƀetter
moments.why: He repurposed Musk’s July 4 patriotic video to frame Bitcoin as part of American strength, moving crypto sentiment.
moments.url: Link to Stocktwits article on Saylor’s Bitcoin reply

moments.author: Mauricio Pochettino
moments.quote: Moments like Fourth of July remind us what this team represents. Happy Independence Day! 48 hours to go ⏱️
moments.why: A rallying message from the USMNT coach ahead of a key World Cup knockout match energized fans.
moments.url: Link to The Spun article about Pochettino’s Instagram post

moments.author: Tom Brady
moments.quote: Tribute honoring Caitlin Clark among great American sports icons
moments.why: Brady spotlighted Caitlin Clark in a high‑profile Independence Day sports tribute, highlighting her rapid rise.
moments.url: Link to Yahoo Sports story on Brady’s Caitlin Clark tribute
